name: karpathy-skills
description: Claude Code tooling derived from Andrej Karpathy's publicly stated observations on working with LLM coding agents.

plugins.name: karpathy
plugins.description: Audit a CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, or .cursor/rules file against Karpathy's four LLM-coding principles — checks both whether the file instructs the agent to follow them (coverage) and whether the file itself is lean, unambiguous, current, and contradiction-free (quality).
